title: Ethiopian Minari Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew combining the intense flavors of Ethiopia with the sweet taste of Minari. Perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the Minari, Berbere spice blend, tomato paste, and vegetable broth. Stir well.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
Store leftovers in the refrigerator for up to 3 days or freeze for up to 2 months.
